summary: Random ranked dungeon rifts are enabled as a one-active-rift-per-rank world layer with Immersive Portals visual surfaces plus helper-owned fallback travel. /ascdungeon spawn_test_here, /ascdungeon open_test_rift, and /ascdungeon spawn_random_now create real generated dungeon instances. /ascdungeon spawn_visual_here and /ascdungeon spawn_test_all_ranks are visual-only gate-art checks. Generated dungeons build in ascendant_dungeons:ranked_dungeon with a safe entry room, connected command-built dungeon rooms, modded decor assets, rank-scaled modded enemy pools, bounded dungeon loot tables, a mandatory boss room, timed entrance rifts, boss-locked return gates, reports, and cleanup. The live scheduler can hold one D, one C, one B, one A, and one S rift at the same time for five active rifts total. This is still not the final authored dungeon event director.

portal_system.portal_safety_note: The helper now creates circular Immersive Portals special-shape surfaces and marks them teleportable. Helper walk-in commands remain as fallback/admin plumbing, not the intended player-facing travel path.

random_spawning.spawn_model: rare timed rifts selected by distance, rank weights, safe footing, and active-rift limit

acceptance_before_expanding_random_spawn: Immersive Portals jar is present in the active instance.
Game starts without a portal-mod crash.
/ascdungeon spawn_random_now creates a timed world rift on safe ground.
Gate texture is fixed-facing, not billboarded toward the player.
Portal size varies by rank and higher ranks have larger ranges.
Walking into the gate enters the safe no-mob entry room.
No return gate exists before the boss is defeated.
Defeating the tagged boss opens the return gate.
The return gate sends the player back near the entrance.
/ascdungeon cleanup_instance removes the dungeon, entities, gate visuals, and portal surfaces.
Combat rooms spawn rank-appropriate modded enemies and use ascendant_dungeons entity loot tables.
Boss room ends each run and uses a rank-appropriate boss plus rank-bounded boss rewards.
